Name: PvZ2_Prerelease_PinataParty_0_Fixed

Updates.en: Added pinata whacking outro for Piñata Party Levels.
Updates.zh: 为彩陶盛宴关卡添加彩陶奖励环节。

Updates.en: Fixed the bug that causes zombies spawning on wrong positions in Cannon Away.
Updates.zh: 修复了加农炮之战僵尸排布错误的问题。

NewFeatures: 为彩陶盛宴关卡添加彩陶奖励环节。
